entity.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange taken offline in January 2020 during a migration and acquisition process, followed by an announced relaunch plan whose durable completion and later operating continuity remain insufficiently verified.
entity.notes: COSS remains inactive rather than dead because the official team described acquisition negotiations and a relaunch plan after taking the exchange offline. No sufficiently strong terminal shutdown marker or verified sustained relaunch has been established in the reviewed evidence.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange that appears inactive, with closure details that remain only partially verified.
expected.notes: COSS was taken offline on 2020-01-07 and later described acquisition negotiations and a relaunch plan. Because the record is too ambiguous for a clean dead-side classification, it is moved to inactive pending deeper verification.

changes.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange taken offline in January 2020 during a migration and acquisition process, followed by an announced relaunch plan whose durable completion and later operating continuity remain insufficiently verified.
changes.notes: COSS remains inactive rather than dead because the official team described acquisition negotiations and a relaunch plan after taking the exchange offline. No sufficiently strong terminal shutdown marker or verified sustained relaunch has been established in the reviewed evidence.

events.title: COSS exchange was taken offline
events.description: The COSS team stated that the exchange was taken offline on January 7, 2020 during a migration process that was later interrupted by acquisition negotiations and technical audits.
events.notes: This is an operational interruption marker, not a confirmed permanent shutdown date.

evidence.title: Update: COSS exchange relaunch and roadmap
evidence.notes: Official team update describing the January 7, 2020 offline date, acquisition negotiations, audits, and intended relaunch.

evidence.title: Archived COSS exchange domain
evidence.notes: Archive index preserving the historical COSS domain while the original domain is no longer treated as a live exchange endpoint.
